tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Advanced: Edits a file. Preferred mode: 'block' (search for search_block and replace with replace_block). Also supports 'line' (replace line number), 'string' (literal replacement), and 'regex' (regex replacement). Requires unique search_block for 'block' mode. Syntax validation is performed for .py, .go, .rb.

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Returns comprehensive metadata about a file including size, MIME type, and previews (Head/Tail/Random). Use this first to understand the structure of market data files.

tools.name: grep_file
tools.description: Searches for a regex pattern in a file and returns matches with surrounding context lines. Results include line numbers.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: Lists all files and directories in the current workspace or a specific subdirectory. Defaults to current directory if path is omitted. Use this to see what files exist.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Reads specific lines from a file (text mode) or bytes (hexdump mode). Use the exact filename found via list_files. Results include line numbers.

count.description: Number of lines (text) or bytes (hexdump) to read

hexdump.description: If true, read in binary hexdump format

tools.name: shell
tools.description:
Executes a shell command. WORKSPACE is at /workspace. ISOLATION: 4 CPUs, 500MB/s Write, Disk limit = 10GB. AVAILABLE TOOLS:
- PARALLEL: 'parallel --pipe --block 10M ./strategy' - process large candle datasets using all CPU cores.
- DUCKDB: 'duckdb -c "SELECT * FROM candles.parquet WHERE symbol=\'BTCUSDT\'"' - fastest SQL for OHLCV/Parquet/JSON.
- POLARS/PANDAS: 'python3 -c "import polars as pl; df = pl.read_parquet(\'candles.parquet\'); print(df.describe())"' - high-performance market data analysis.
- DATAMASH: 'datamash mean 5 < ohlcv.txt' - fast column statistics (e.g. average close price).
- PV: 'cat candles.parquet | pv | ...' - monitor progress of long pipes.
- RIPGREP (rg): 'rg BTCUSDT candles.json' - fastest text search across tick data.
- ZSTD: 'zstd -d candles.zst' - fast decompression of market data archives.
- JQ: 'jq \'.[] | select(.symbol == "BTCUSDT")\' trades.json' - filter and transform JSON market data.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Creates or overwrites a file in the workspace. Useful for creating scripts, configuration files, or data files.
